descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup semifinal in Humboldt, Saskatchewan.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes from British Columbia defeated Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a sudden-death semifinal game Thursday night at the 1987 Centennial Cup junior-A hockey tournament in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Richmond advanced to the championship final with a 2-1 round-robin record and would face Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in the final Saturday night. Goal scorers included Dean Rutledge, Steve Jaques, Matt Hervey, Brian Kozak, Paul Rutherford, and Jason Phillips.
